channel.title: Elmoorx Framework Blog
channel.description: Tutorials, announcements, and deep dives into Elmoorx Framework — the 4kb frontend framework with zero-hydration islands.

item.title: Elmoorx Framework 2.0 — The Most Complete Frontend Framework Ever Built
item.dc:creator: Elmoorx Foundation
item.description: Today we're shipping Elmoorx 2.0 — 73 packages, 61 UI components, 24 API endpoints, 862 tests, and 10 revolutionary features no competitor has.
item.content:encoded:
Today, we're excited to announce Elmoorx Framework 2.0 — the result of 18 months of development, 73 packages, 61 UI components, and 862 tests.

What's New

  • 73 npm packages
  • 24 API endpoints (auth, payments, email, files, WebSocket)
  • 10 revolutionary features (time-travel, visual builder, AI tests, voice, gesture, blockchain, AR, collab)
  • 4.2kb runtime (97.3% smaller than React)
  • 28ms cold start (29x faster than Next.js)
  • Lighthouse 100/100

item.title: Why Zero Hydration Is a Solved Problem
item.dc:creator: Elmoorx Foundation
item.description: Hydration is expensive, slow, and unnecessary. Here's how Elmoorx eliminates it entirely with islands architecture.
item.content:encoded:
Every time you load a Next.js page, 187kb of JavaScript downloads, parses, and executes just to make the page interactive. This process is called hydration — and it's the #1 performance bottleneck in modern web frameworks.

The Solution: Islands Architecture

Elmoorx uses an islands architecture — only interactive components ship JavaScript. Everything else is pure HTML.

item.title: Edge Runtime Comparison: Elmoorx vs Next.js vs SvelteKit (2026)
item.dc:creator: Elmoorx Foundation
item.description: We deployed the same Hacker News clone to Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge, and Deno Deploy. Here are the real numbers.
item.content:encoded:
We deployed the same Hacker News clone (100 stories, voting, comments, auth) to three edge platforms.

Bundle Size

FrameworkSize
Elmoorx4.2kb
SvelteKit38kb
Next.js187kb

Elmoorx is 10.7x smaller than Next.js.

item.title: Building a Complete SaaS App with Elmoorx in 1 Hour
item.dc:creator: Elmoorx Foundation
item.description: Authentication, payments, subscriptions, file storage, email, and real-time — all built-in. Build a production SaaS app in under an hour.
item.content:encoded:
Most SaaS apps need: authentication, payments, file storage, email, and real-time features. With Elmoorx, it's all built-in.

Step 1: Create the Project

elmoorx create my-saas

Step 2: Add Auth

import { useAuth } from "@elmoorx/auth";

Step 3: Add Payments

import { usePayment } from "@elmoorx/payment";

item.title: How to Migrate from React to Elmoorx (Automatically)
item.dc:creator: Elmoorx Foundation
item.description: Elmoorx includes a built-in migration tool that converts React, Next.js, Vue, and Svelte code automatically.
item.content:encoded:
Elmoorx's migration tool (@elmoorx/migration) automatically converts React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, and Angular code to Elmoorx syntax.

Quick Migration

elmoorx migrate --from=react ./src

Conversions

  • useState → $state
  • useEffect → $effect
  • className → class
  • dangerouslySetInnerHTML → $html
